name: compliance trace: when every standards_state, pr_corpus_state, AND compliance_state entry across the commit window is fresh, /audit-pack emits the all-three-fresh badge per C-10
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc","standards_state":{"a":{"freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}},"pr_corpus_state":{"b":{"freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}},"compliance_state":{"c":{"freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}}}' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section badges && grep -E "all-three-fresh" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
